task: Browse recipes for gluten-free chocolate chip cookies that can be made without nuts.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the browsing task on Cookpad and identified multiple gluten-free chocolate chip cookie recipes whose visible ingredient lists did not include peanuts or tree nuts. This is supported by the search results page showing relevant recipes and by direct recipe-page snapshots / extracted ingredient blocks for several recipes (e.g. recipes 25497039, 13653960, 11003939, 5334073, 338101, 336866, 398705, 11924138). The final response reasonably summarized suitable options and noted coconut-containing recipes as caveats. Although some intermediate parsing attempts failed and one regex briefly mis-flagged a recipe because its description said 'free from ... tree nuts,' the final recommendations were backed by the visible ingredient lists and matched the user's request to browse recipes rather than perform a stricter certified-allergen verification.
final_result_response:
I found several Cookpad gluten-free chocolate chip cookie recipes whose ingredient lists do not include peanuts or tree nuts.

Best matches:

1. [Gluten Free & Vegan Chocolate Chip Cookies](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/25497039)  
   Nut-free, vegan, gluten-free. Uses oat flour, brown rice flour, tapioca starch, flaxseed, avocado oil, and chocolate chips.

2. [Vegan Gluten free Chocolate Chip Cookie](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/13653960)  
   15 to 18 servings, 15 minutes. Uses rice flour, banana compote, margarine, brown sugar, and chocolate chips.

3. [Gluten-Free Chocolate Chip Cookies](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/11003939)  
   36 to 48 cookies, 11 to 12 minutes per batch. Uses gluten-free flour, shortening/butter, eggs, sugars, and chocolate chips.

4. [Gluten Free Chocolate Chip Cookies](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/5334073)  
   2 dozen cookies. Uses gluten-free flour blend, rice flour, oat bran, butter, eggs, and chocolate chips.

5. [Vickys Chocolate Chip Cookies, GF DF EF SF NF](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/336866)  
   40 servings, 20 minutes. Gluten-free and explicitly “NF” for nut-free. Note: includes light coconut milk.

6. [Vickys Chewy Chocolate Chip Cookies, Gluten, Dairy, Egg & Soy-Free](https://cookpad.com/eng/recipes/338101)  
   36 servings, 55 minutes. Uses gluten-free flour mix, applesauce, agave, and chocolate chips. It lists “olive or coconut oil,” so choose olive oil if avoiding coconut too.

I’d start with #1 if you want the clearest allergy-friendly option, or #3 if you want a more classic chocolate chip cookie style.
action_history: Opening Cookpad: const p1 = await openTab('https://cookpad.com/');
Searching Cookpad recipes: await page.locator('e12').fill('gluten-free chocolate chip cookies no nuts');
